text.message: Honestly I worry green has the upper hand this game
Green has every resource and I have no ore
Im not even taking a card
Can we please not target me
Red are you teaming with green or something?
U wanna roll everyone on me
i just don't like people tabletalking
we can see green has a good set up
we can also see your sheep port
well green biggest threat on earth but rob me
And the fact that you’re teaming with green scares me
ok so everyone a threat except you right ?
We are all threat to each other i think???
u fight army and I will fight road?
blue you going ore port next ?
idk prob not going for the stone port
Honestly I wanted to plow you but I won’t make an enemy out of the one person with common sense
he does not talk unless if it's for luring people
if he doen't talk, there's something fishy
What do you need for the plow?
the dude wanted to plow you
Why would you want red with the ore port????
You guys are weir d af
but I had no sheep and I cant port brick because I lose 2
Green why are you helping red
That’s enough to report, thank you
Okay now I’m muting you both
oj let me know what u need to start dev
we need to perm block 8 stone
blue, you almost have no chance to win
all you're doing is playing oj's gam
well your not trading me any stone
so why should I listen to u
U see blue orange did his best interest:)
hes the only one trading me
if you team up with him he's gonna win way before you're getting a glimpse of victory
I didn’t ask blue for anything, in fact, I gave him a road in exchange for a wheat
I asked for wheat and sheep
im dead last and hes willing to give me stuff
I’m the only one who’s helped him
Giving the road didn’t help me
It was so blue could plow
Blue, I’m glad you see through their table talk
they are way ahead, it makes no sense for me to help them
there is no universe in wich you win this game before oj
Red, who do you think is winning
you if blue doesn't see your little gmae
Hes sad for you blue xd
WE ARE ALL PLAYING TO WIN
Blue I have wood and brick for you
Red took a brick and I hope he gives it to you
It’s fine red did it so I go under 7
Red should have lots of brick tho
I have wood and brick for you blue
Dude he have 3 dvs blue wtf
I’ll give it all away lol
It would be better for me to keep
trade him the win little minion
IM CLEARLY DOING A GOOD TRADE FOR HIM NOT ME
he could have won if he had a yop
Thats a long term investment xd
